subcodes.title: Kitab al-Vahid 17 (Tablet to the seventeenth Letter of the Living)
subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He before Whom all the dwellers of earth and heaven humble themselves! Say: All shall find life in Him
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الاعلی الحمید. سبحان الذی تخضع له من فی السموات و الأرض قل کل الیه یبعثون هو الذی بیده من فی السموات
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
